subject: A large humanoid figure with visible red-orange arm markings hoists a massive boulder overhead, with a creature below them in a dynamic overhead composition
description: The image is composed from an overhead-looking-down angle. A large humanoid figure — visible from roughly the waist up — holds an enormous rounded boulder raised above their head. The figure's forearms and hands are adorned with red-orange tribal or rune-like markings that are clearly visible against their skin. Below the figure, a creature with a horned or armored head is visible being crushed or targeted. Debris and smaller rocks fly outward. The background sky is pale gold and warm. The scale of the boulder relative to the figure suggests great supernatural strength.
foreground: large humanoid hoisting boulder with marked forearms, creature below
background: pale gold sky, debris and rock fragments
